caption: The video depicts a formal discussion or interview taking place at the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop. Two men are seated on stage, facing each other. The man on the right, dressed in a dark suit and tie, is holding a notepad and appears to be speaking, gesturing with his hand for emphasis. The man on the left, wearing a blazer over a checkered shirt, listens attentively with his hands clasped together. Both individuals have name tags, suggesting they are participants in an organized event or panel discussion. The setting includes a small table with water glasses, adding to the professional atmosphere of the scene.
